CRITICAL.desc: Default JWT secret in config - anyone can forge tokens

Registration schema allows "admin" role - users can register as admin and gain full privileges
loginUser() has TODO for password verification - returns token without any password check

HIGH.desc: Empty Stripe/DB credentials fall through silently
Empty Stripe/DB credentials fall through silently
refreshToken() ignores request body - returns new token for hardcoded user without verifying old refresh token
In-memory array storage in userService - all data lost on server restart
In-memory array storage in jobService - all data lost on server restart
In-memory array storage in proposalService - all data lost on server restart
In-memory array storage in messageService - all data lost on server restart
In-memory array storage in reviewService - all data lost on server restart
In-memory array storage in notificationService - all data lost on server restart
No schema validation on proposal controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No schema validation on message controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No schema validation on review controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No schema validation on user controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No schema validation on notification controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No schema validation on payment controller - req.body passed directly without parsing
No file size limit or file type restriction on upload route - allows DoS via large files
connectDb() is a placeholder - never actually connects to PostgreSQL database

MEDIUM.desc: No validation that budgetMin <= budgetMax - clients can set impossible budgets
Admin metrics are hardcoded mock data - returns fake numbers instead of querying database
